summary: High-quality script and workflow design, but critical gaps prevent shipping. Missing: (1) Test fixture files (fixtures/licenses.csv, allow.txt, deny.txt, sample-manifest.txt) referenced throughout but not provided—workflow cannot run without them. (2) Actionlint validation—required by task but no actionlint step in workflow or validation evidence shown. (3) No act output (act-result.txt) demonstrating successful test runs. Workflow YAML structure is solid (v4 checkout, proper permissions, sensible triggers), and license-check.sh is excellent (proper error handling, clear logic, well-commented). However, the deliverable is incomplete: run-act-tests.sh copies fixtures via tar (line 37-39) that don't exist, and workflow depends on env vars pointing to nonexistent fixture paths. Code quality: 4.5/5. Completeness: 1/5. Cannot merge as-is.
